title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd!
